untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) Correlation coefficient calculation over 20 days to rank markets by trendiness — correlation coefficient is not in the allowed indicator list; (2) Dynamic switching between linear regression trend-following (period ≤20 days) and mean reversion based on correlation threshold — linear regression indicator not available; (3) Market ranking/selection logic across multiple instruments — backtest engine structure does not support cross-market ranking. translation_notes: This is a market selection and regime-adaptive strategy that requires correlation analysis across multiple markets and conditional indicator switching.
